name: ingest-tiktok-nightly
_fix_notes: 2. SQL alias changed to access_token (plaintext) — rename column in DB or add decryption if truly encrypted
3. API endpoint updated to TikTok v2 /video/query/
4. Auth moved to Authorization Bearer header
5. Merge node added after API call to preserve channel_id context
6. Pagination loop added via SplitInBatches + cursor tracking
7. IF node added to gate on TikTok success code === 0
8. impressions corrected to 0 (not equal to views)
9. platform field added to DB insert
10. Upsert (ON CONFLICT DO UPDATE) replaces plain insert
11. Error path logs failure separately; success log only fires on verified success
12. active left false — flip to true after testing

parameters.query: SELECT id AS channel_id, account_id, access_token FROM channels WHERE platform = 'tiktok' AND connected_status = 'connected';

INSERT INTO post_metrics (
  channel_id, platform, metric_date,
  reach, impressions, engagements, clicks,
  likes, comments, shares, saves,
  video_views, watch_time_seconds, profile_visits, follower_count,
  created_at
) VALUES (
  '{{ $json.channel_id }}', '{{ $json.platform }}', '{{ $json.metric_date }}',
  {{ $json.reach }}, {{ $json.impressions }}, {{ $json.engagements }}, {{ $json.clicks }},
  {{ $json.likes }}, {{ $json.comments }}, {{ $json.shares }}, {{ $json.saves }},
  {{ $json.video_views }}, {{ $json.watch_time_seconds }}, {{ $json.profile_visits }}, {{ $json.follower_count }},
  '{{ $json.created_at }}'
)
ON CONFLICT (channel_id, metric_date)
DO UPDATE SET
  reach = post_metrics.reach + EXCLUDED.reach,
  impressions = post_metrics.impressions + EXCLUDED.impressions,
  engagements = post_metrics.engagements + EXCLUDED.engagements,
  likes = post_metrics.likes + EXCLUDED.likes,
  comments = post_metrics.comments + EXCLUDED.comments,
  shares = post_metrics.shares + EXCLUDED.shares,
  saves = post_metrics.saves + EXCLUDED.saves,
  video_views = post_metrics.video_views + EXCLUDED.video_views,
  created_at = EXCLUDED.created_at;

INSERT INTO action_log (action_type, resource_type, actor, actor_type, status, details, created_at)
VALUES ('workflow_execution', 'ingestion', 'n8n', 'system', 'success',
  '{{ JSON.stringify({ workflow: "ingest-tiktok-nightly", metrics_count: $input.all().length }) }}',
  now());

INSERT INTO action_log (action_type, resource_type, actor, actor_type, status, details, created_at)
VALUES ('workflow_execution', 'ingestion', 'n8n', 'system', 'failure',
  '{{ JSON.stringify({ workflow: "ingest-tiktok-nightly", error: $json.error }) }}',
  now());
